revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23177433986|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Cmbox | type = notice | textstyle = text-align: center; | text = This is a '''counter [[Help:Category|category]]'''. It contains items specifically for the purpose of counting them, in order to [[WP:PROJCATS|assist with maintenance]]. It is not part of the encyclopaedia; do not include it in content categories. {{Purge button|center}} }} {{Possibly empty category}}<!-- shouldn't be empty, but people get keen --> {{Hidden category}} <includeonly></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- Please add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Counter categories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{Cmbox | type = notice | textstyle = text-align: center; | text = This is a '''counter [[Help:Category|category]]'''. It contains items specifically for the purpose of counting them, in order to [[WP:PROJCATS|assist with maintenance]]. It is not part of the encyclopaedia; do not include it in content categories. {{Purge button|center}} }} {{Possibly empty category}}<!-- shouldn't be empty, but people get keen --> {{Hidden category}} <includeonly></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- Please add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Counter categories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Counter_category here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Counter_category for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Cmbox | type = notice | textstyle = text-align: center; | text = This is a '''counter [[Help:Category|category]]'''. It contains items specifically for the purpose of counting them, in order to [[WP:PROJCATS|assist with maintenance]]. It is not part of the encyclopaedia; do not include it in content categories. {{Purge button|center}} }} {{Possibly empty category}}<!-- shouldn't be empty, but people get keen --> {{Hidden category}} <includeonly></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- Please add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Counter categories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
